name: Remote Transmitter → Transmit Byronsx
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) sends a Byron Doorbell RF protocol code to a remote transmitter.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The 8-bit ID to send, see dumper output for more info.

config_entries.label: Command
config_entries.description: The command to send, see dumper output for more info. Defaults to `0x10`.
